prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约11433→26103（含A1段）→10768→22965（含A1段）→21967，近年因新高考选科组划分，不限组位次明显后移；2025年基准约21967名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年201人、2022年201人、2023年202人、2024年204人、2025年209人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划211人，较2025年增加2人（+0.96%），扩招幅度极小，对竞争影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第80名，近年排名稳定在80名左右，学校层次稳固；2026年声誉偏负面，涉及学术不端事件（学生盗用他人作品参赛被通报开除），对报考热度有轻微负面影响；抖音热度一般（总排名第77位），短视频曝光量中等；管理科学与工程A（唯一A级学科），与该校信息管理与信息系统、大数据管理与应用等招生专业直接相关；工科整体实力强劲，机械、电气、计算机等传统优势方向突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热，对工科强校合肥工业大学形成报考支撑；本省物理类考生2026年167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+0.96%）、物理类考生减少约3.4%以及声誉偏负面等因素，在2025年基准21967名基础上，供需弹性计算得主值约22093名，结合考生减少带来的竞争缓和做小幅下调；预测最低位次约22043名，区间21543–22543名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 11433 → 26103 (including A1 segment) → 10768 → 22965 (including A1 segment) → 21967. In recent years, due to the division of subject groups under the new college entrance examination, the ranking for unrestricted groups has significantly shifted backward. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 21967. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 201 in 2021, 201 in 2022, 202 in 2023, 204 in 2024, and 209 in 2025, with a slight annual expansion. The 2026 plan is 211, an increase of 2 (+0.96%) compared to 2025, with a very small expansion rate, having limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings around 80th in recent years, indicating a solid school level. The reputation in 2026 is slightly negative, involving an academic misconduct incident (a student was disqualified for plagiarizing others' works in a competition), which has a minor negative impact on application popularity. Douyin popularity is average (ranked 77th overall), with moderate short video exposure. Management Science and Engineering is rated A (the only A-level discipline), directly related to enrollment majors such as Information Management and Information Systems, and Big Data Management and Application. The overall engineering strength is strong, with traditional advantages in mechanical, electrical, and computer fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular socially, supporting applications to Hefei University of Technology, a strong engineering school. The number of physics category examinees in the province in 2026 is 167,419, a decrease of approximately 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of historical rankings shifting backward, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+0.96%), a decrease of approximately 3.4% in physics category examinees, and a slightly negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 21967, the supply-demand elasticity calculation yields a main value of approximately 22093. With a slight downward adjustment due to eased competition from fewer examinees, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 22043, with a range of 21543 to 22543.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems
- Electronic Information Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 21543 to 22543, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice. Tier 1 majors can be attempted as a stretch (popular majors like Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Integrated Circuit Design have historical rankings far below the lower limit of the predicted range, so evaluate based on your own ranking). Tier 3 majors serve as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 21000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第80名，学校层次稳固；2026年声誉偏负面，涉及学术不端事件，对报考热度有轻微负面影响；抖音热度一般；管理科学与工程A，但文科招生专业（法学、思想政治教育）与该学科关联较弱；法学专业社会热度偏热（推荐），思想政治教育平稳。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年计划大幅缩招（-28.6%）及历史类考生大幅减少（-25.6%）等因素，供需弹性计算得主值约1520名；缩招与考生减少方向相反，声誉偏负面轻微推高位次；预测最低位次约1540名，区间1040–2040名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2296 → 2440 → 2103 → 2354 → 1835, fluctuating within the 1800–2500 range overall. The 2025 baseline is about 1835, the lowest ranking in recent years (best performance). The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 11 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 7 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 5 students, a decrease of 2 (-28.6%) from 2025, indicating significant enrollment reduction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable university level. In 2026, reputation is slightly negative due to academic misconduct incidents, having a minor adverse effect on application popularity; Douyin popularity is average. Management Science and Engineering is rated A, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education) are weakly related to this discipline. Law major has a hot social popularity (recommended), while Ideological and Political Education is stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major has a hot social popularity, attracting some liberal arts applicants. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is 63,113, a decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, significantly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-28.6%), and the substantial decrease in history category examinees (-25.6%), the supply-demand elasticity calculation yields a main value of about 1520. The enrollment reduction and examinee decrease have opposite effects, while the slightly negative reputation pushes the ranking upward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1540, with a range of 1040–2040.
